revision.comment: adding "at" as an alias for "loc" (similar to cite xxx templates)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
</noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (

|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_text here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_text for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here -->

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_text for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Footnotes|harvard_citation
|bracket_year_left = (
|bracket_year_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}||)}}
|bracket_right = {{#if:{{{p|}}}{{{page|}}}{{{pp|}}}{{{pages|}}}{{{loc|}}}{{{at|}}}|)}}
|template=harvtxt
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
